result: The task has been completed successfully. The cleaned dataset has been created with exactly 5 variables (NSID, educ25, educ32, educadtl32, educvdtl32) and saved to data/output/cleaned_data.csv. The dataset contains 9408 rows. All educational qualification variables have been derived according to the specifications: educ25 and educ32 are 5-level collapsed NVQ categorical variables (0-4) with preserved missing codes, and educadtl32 and educvdtl32 are detailed qualification labels from wave 9.
